# W1T2 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal
Create the crate root skeleton in `src/lib.rs` so the public module tree, internal module boundaries, lint configuration, feature-gated backends, and top-level re-exports all match the architecture document.

## Related Design Documents
- `design/01-architecture.md` §3
- `design/01-architecture.md` §6
- `design/01-architecture.md` §7
- `design/01-architecture.md` §8
- `design/00-coding.md` §3

## Dependencies
- W1T1

## Files to Create/Modify
- `src/lib.rs`

## Implementation Details
- Add crate attributes exactly:
  - `#![cfg_attr(docsrs, feature(doc_cfg))]`
  - `#![warn(missing_docs)]`
  - `#![warn(missing_debug_implementations)]`
  - `#![warn(rust_2024_compatibility)]`
  - `#![warn(unsafe_op_in_unsafe_fn)]`
  - `#![warn(clippy::unwrap_used)]`
- Add internal modules:
  - `mod private;`
  - `mod dispatch;`
- Add public modules in this order:
  - `pub mod error;`
  - `pub mod dimension;`
  - `pub mod element;`
  - `pub mod complex;`
  - `pub mod storage;`
  - `pub mod layout;`
  - `pub mod tensor;`
  - `pub mod iter;`
  - `pub mod math;`
  - `pub mod overload;`
  - `pub mod matrix;`
  - `pub mod util;`
  - `pub mod set;`
  - `pub mod broadcast;`
  - `pub mod reduction;`
  - `pub mod shape;`
  - `pub mod index;`
  - `pub mod construct;`
  - `pub mod convert;`
  - `pub mod format;`
  - `pub mod ffi;`
  - `pub mod workspace;`
- Add conditional internal backend modules:
  - `#[cfg(feature = "simd")]`
  - `#[cfg_attr(docsrs, doc(cfg(feature = "simd")))]`
  - `pub(crate) mod simd;`
  - `#[cfg(feature = "parallel")]`
  - `#[cfg_attr(docsrs, doc(cfg(feature = "parallel")))]`
  - `pub(crate) mod parallel;`
- Add prelude wiring:
  - `pub mod prelude;`
  - `pub use prelude::*;`
  - `pub use error::XenonError;`
- Keep `dispatch` internal only. Do not re-export it.

## Test Plan
- Add a smoke test module only if needed for compile verification.
- Verification scenarios:
  - `cargo check` with default features
  - `cargo check --features simd`
  - `cargo check --features parallel`
  - `cargo doc --no-deps`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `src/lib.rs` matches the module structure in `01-architecture.md` §8.
- `simd` and `parallel` stay `pub(crate)` and feature-gated.
- `private` and `dispatch` stay non-public.
- `prelude` and `XenonError` are re-exported exactly once.
- `cargo check` and `cargo doc --no-deps` succeed.

## Development Workflow
1. Write the crate attributes and module declarations.
2. Add feature-gated backend declarations.
3. Add prelude and `XenonError` re-exports.
4. Run compile and doc checks, then fix only root-module issues.
